raw:
{
  "verses": [
    {
      "n": 1,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "isflahpis/ tad peefauze wiſch to
RUÑGU/ un fazzija : tu eſſi zaurn
tawa Kalpa Rohku ſcho leelu Pe-
ſtſchunu dewis/ un un irr mann
no Slahpehm jamirſt / un ſcho
Neapgraisitu Rohkâ jakriht.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 19,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Tad ſchkehle Deews wee-
nn Dſerroksſli / kas Schohſta-
Kaulâ bija / tad iggahje Uhdens
no ta/ un wiſch dſehre / tad at-
ſpirge wiſcha Gars / un wiſch
atdſihjahs/ tapehz noſauze wiſch
wiſcha Weetu ta Peefauzeja
Awotu/ kas eekſch Leejas irr/ lihds
ſchai paſchai Deenat.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 20,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un wiſch teefaja Iſraêlu
to Wihlisteru Laika/ diwideſmits
Gaddus.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 1,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Ta XVI. Nodalla.
Simsans dsenn Manzibu eekſch Gasas : 1.
Tohp no teem Eedſhwotajeem zaurn Nahti
apſlehgts un ſargahts : 2. Bet wiſch iſzelf
ta Pilſſahta Wahrtis un neſs tahs uhs wee-
nu Kalnu : 3. Delila iſwaiza / no kurrenes
winnam tas Stiprums nahf : 4/5/6. Lee-
fams tas winnai to stahsta : 16. Us to win-
sam tas Spehks suhd : 17. Un wiſch tohp
no teem Wihlisteruem Zeetuma lifts un ap-
ſulbohts : 21. Bet pehvgi wiſch pee teem
atreebjahs wiſan Deewa-Nammu nogahs-
dams : 23/26. Un nomirſt lihds ar winneem:
30. Iſraêlu teefajis 20. Gaddus : 31.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 1,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Ad gahje Simsans us
Basu/ un eeraudsſja tur
weenut Seewu / kas
Mauka bija/ un eegahje pee tahs.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 2,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Tad tappe teem Gaſtereeem
faZZihts : Simsans irr ſchurp
nahzis/ tad gahje tee apkahrt/ un
gluhneja us winnu zaurn wiſſu
Nahti Pilſſahta Wahrtis/ un
ralikke klun winnu Nahti/un faZ-
zijs : Kad rihtu Gaſima nahk/
"
    },
    {
      "n": 1,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "tad nokaufitt mehs winnu. Be-
Simsans gulleja lihds puſs Nahti
"
    },
    {
      "n": 3,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Tad zehlahs wiſch Nahti
Widdti/ un faagrahbe ta Pilsfah-
ta Wahrtu Durwis/ ar teem di-
wi Stabbeem/ un iſzehle tah-
lihds ar to Atsbihdamo / un liſſ-
tahs us faweem Kameſcheem/ un-
neffe tahs augſcham us ta Kaln-
Wirs-Gallu/ kas preeſch Gebro-
na irr.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 4,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un pehz to fahe wiſſ-
weenu Seewu mihleht pee Sor-
ka Uppes / Delila Wahrdâ.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 5,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Tad nahze pee winnas t
Wihlisteru Leelt-Kungi augſcham
un fazzija us to : pahrrunna wi-
nu/ un luhsco eekſch ka winna lee-
Spehks stahw / un ar ko meh-
spehjam winnu pahrwarreht/ un-
winnu faistiht / ka mehs winn-
peewaldiht warram / tad dobſi-
mehs tew ikkatrs tuhkſtoſchus u-
fimts Sudraba Gabbalus.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 6,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Tad fazzija Delila us Sim-
sanu : Stahſti man / luhsame-
eekſch ka stahw taws leeſs Spehks-
un ar ko tew warr faistiht/ un te-
peewaldiht?
"
    },
    {
      "n": 7,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un Simsans fazzija us to-
Ja tee mann faistihtu ar feptinſa-
tahm Luhku Wirwehm/ kas we-
ne irr faſaltufchas/ tad taptu-
nespehzigs/ un buhtu itt ka zit-
Zilweks.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 8,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Tad nefte to Wihlisteru Le-
li-Kungi pee winnas augſcha-
feptix ſaltas Luhku Wirwes / ka-
ne bija faſaltufchas / un win-
faizzija to ar tahm.
"
    }
  ],
  "confidence": "high",
  "notes": ""
}
